ValidationRule.description: Once a Return Item is added to a Core Return Case the Core Return Location Cannot be changed by a Dealer
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NATT_Number_of_Return_Line_Items__c > 0, NOT(ISBLANK($User.ContactId)), ISCHANGED( NATT_Core_Return_Location__c ), NOT(ISNEW()), NOT( ISBLANK( PRIORVALUE( NATT_Core_Return_Location__c ) ) )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot modify the Core Return Location once it is set. Please contact Carrier if you need further assistance.
